_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.
_publications._context: sNF96.2 (a MPNST cell line derived from a patient with NF1, used as target cells) | U87-MG, U251-MG, and sNF96.2 cells were purchased from ATCC | The SNF96.2 (CRL-2884, RRID: CVCL_K281) human MPNST cell line and the HEK-293T (CRL-3216, RRID: CVCL_0063) cell line were obtained from ATCC | Human MPNST cell lines SNF02.2 and SNF96.2 were propagated in DMEM/10% FBS plus L-glutamine and penicillin/streptomycin | MPNST cell lines sNF96.2, sNF02.2 and sNF94.3 were obtained from the American Type Culture Collection | Patient-derived neurofibroma (NF95.11b, NF95.6) or MPNST (SNF02.2, SNF94.3, SNF96.2, ST88-14) cell lines | NF1-associated MPNST cells (sNF96.2, ATCC; MPNST642, MD Anderson; T265, A. Harder) | We also utilized immortalized PN hTERT NF1 ipNF95.6 (iPNF) and MPNST cell lines (sNF96.2 and sNF02.2) from American Type Culture Collection (ATCC) | sNF96.2 (RRID: CVCL_K281; ref. 25), ST88-14 (RRID: CVCL_8916; ref. 26), NF90-8 (RRID: CVCL_1B47; ref. 27)
